detaileddescription.para:
This translation unit implements:
File-tree selection and preview routing (PDF/text/placeholder).
PDF navigation/search/print behavior.
Toolbar + tabbed pane wiring and state updates.
File-system watcher based reload handling.

Member functions
MainWindow slots and private methods are documented in MainWindow.h using Doxygen
,
return, and related tags; definitions in this file omit duplicate blocks to avoid documentation drift.

simplesect.title: File-local helpers
simplesect.para: Functions in the anonymous namespace and PdfDocumentRibbon are documented below.
